example: The cat will scratch the furniture if you do not provide it with a scratching post.
exampleZh: 如果你不给猫提供抓板，它就会抓家具。

example: Scientists are working to harness the power of the sun as a clean energy source.
exampleZh: 科学家们正在努力利用太阳能作为一种清洁能源。

example: The children love to swing back and forth on the old wooden swing in the park.
exampleZh: 孩子们喜欢在公园里那架旧木秋千上来回摇摆。

example: His ankle began to swell shortly after he twisted it playing basketball with his friends.
exampleZh: 他和朋友打篮球扭伤脚踝后不久，脚踝开始肿胀。

example: She asked her son to sweep the kitchen floor before the guests arrived for dinner.
exampleZh: 她让儿子在客人来吃饭前把厨房地板打扫干净。

example: I swear that I did not tell anyone your secret, not even my closest friend.
exampleZh: 我发誓我没有把你的秘密告诉任何人，连我最亲密的朋友也没有。

example: The little girl screamed with excitement when she saw the puppy under the Christmas tree.
exampleZh: 小女孩看到圣诞树下的小狗时兴奋地尖叫起来。

example: His mother scolded him for staying up too late playing video games on a school night.
exampleZh: 他的母亲因为他上学日晚上熬夜打游戏而责骂他。

example: The sudden loud noise from the engine did scare everyone in the small car.
exampleZh: 发动机突然发出的巨响确实吓到了小车里的每个人。

example: The child was fearful of the dark and always slept with a night light turned on.
exampleZh: 那个孩子害怕黑暗，总是开着夜灯睡觉。

example: He was called a coward for running away instead of standing up for his friends.
exampleZh: 他因为逃跑而不是为朋友挺身而出而被叫做懦夫。

example: The timid boy hid behind his mother when the stranger approached to ask for directions.
exampleZh: 当陌生人上前问路时，那个胆小的男孩躲到了母亲身后。

example: The older students tried to intimidate the newcomers, but the teacher quickly intervened.
exampleZh: 高年级学生试图恐吓新生，但老师很快介入制止了。

example: Please make sure to secure all the doors and windows before you leave the house.
exampleZh: 离开房子之前，请确保关好所有的门窗。

example: Wet floors in the shopping mall pose a serious safety hazard for elderly customers.
exampleZh: 商场里湿滑的地板对老年顾客构成严重的安全隐患。

example: The future of the entire company is at stake if this business deal falls through.
exampleZh: 如果这笔交易失败，整个公司的未来都岌岌可危。

example: The tall trees began to sway violently as the strong wind storm passed through the forest.
exampleZh: 当强烈的风暴穿过森林时，高大的树木开始剧烈摇晃。

example: The hunter set a trap deep in the woods to catch wild animals for research purposes.
exampleZh: 猎人在森林深处设下陷阱，为研究目的捕捉野生动物。

example: Make sure to strap your luggage securely to the roof rack before starting the trip.
exampleZh: 出发前一定要把行李牢固地绑在车顶行李架上。

example: Each job application will be judged solely on its own merit, regardless of background.
exampleZh: 每份求职申请都将完全根据其自身的优点来评判，不论背景。

example: Patience is a virtue that can help you navigate many of life's most difficult challenges.
exampleZh: 耐心是一种美德，可以帮助你应对生活中许多最困难的挑战。

example: The phone began to vibrate loudly on the wooden desk, startling everyone in the room.
exampleZh: 手机在木桌上开始剧烈振动，吓了房间里所有人一跳。

example: The violent storm destroyed dozens of houses and knocked down power lines across the town.
exampleZh: 猛烈的暴风雨摧毁了镇上几十所房屋并刮倒了电线。

example: Any student who violates the school's code of conduct will face disciplinary action.
exampleZh: 任何违反学校行为规范的学生都将面临纪律处分。

example: The captain used the stars to navigate the ship safely across the vast open ocean.
exampleZh: 船长利用星星来引导船只安全穿过辽阔的海洋。

example: The manager decided to summon an emergency meeting to address the sudden financial crisis.
exampleZh: 经理决定召集紧急会议来应对突发的财务危机。

example: The war veteran shared his incredible stories of courage and survival with the students.
exampleZh: 这位战争老兵与学生们分享了他关于勇气和生存的不可思议的故事。

example: There was a slight change in the schedule, so please check the updated timetable carefully.
exampleZh: 时间表有轻微变动，请仔细查看更新的时刻表。

example: To the children's great delight, the circus came to their small town for the first time.
exampleZh: 让孩子们大为高兴的是，马戏团第一次来到他们的小镇。

example: The documentary highlighted the desperate plight of refugees fleeing the war-torn region.
exampleZh: 这部纪录片突出了逃离战乱地区的难民的绝望困境。

example: The potato blight destroyed the entire crop, leading to widespread famine in the region.
exampleZh: 马铃薯枯萎病摧毁了全部庄稼，导致该地区出现大范围饥荒。

example: The passengers were asked to alight from the bus as it had developed a mechanical fault.
exampleZh: 乘客被要求下车，因为巴士出现了机械故障。

example: A single spark from the campfire was enough to ignite the dry grass nearby.
exampleZh: 篝火的一粒火星就足以点燃附近的干草。

example: The report aims to highlight the most critical challenges facing the education system today.
exampleZh: 该报告旨在突出当今教育系统面临的最关键的挑战。

example: Losing the major client was a serious setback, but the team refused to give up hope.
exampleZh: 失去这个大客户是一个严重的挫折，但团队拒绝放弃希望。

example: The constant technical problems began to frustrate the entire software development team.
exampleZh: 不断出现的技术问题开始使整个软件开发团队感到沮丧。

example: Her parents tried to discourage her from dropping out of college in her final year.
exampleZh: 她的父母试图劝阻她在最后一年不要从大学退学。

example: The soldiers were ordered to retreat after realizing the enemy forces were far too strong.
exampleZh: 意识到敌军兵力过于强大后，士兵们奉命撤退。

example: She decided to withdraw all her savings from the bank to invest in her new business.
exampleZh: 她决定从银行取出所有积蓄来投资她的新生意。

example: The company plans to replace all the old computers with the latest models next month.
exampleZh: 公司计划下个月用最新型号替换所有旧电脑。

example: The flood displaced thousands of families from their homes along the river valley.
exampleZh: 洪水使河谷沿岸成千上万的家庭流离失所。

example: The agreement helped to cement the strong relationship between the two neighboring countries.
exampleZh: 该协议有助于巩固两个邻国之间的牢固关系。

example: The sharp needle will pierce the thick fabric easily if you apply enough pressure.
exampleZh: 如果施加足够的压力，锋利的针很容易刺穿厚布料。

example: You need at least three years of experience to qualify for this senior management position.
exampleZh: 你需要至少三年的经验才能有资格担任这个高级管理职位。

example: The airline agreed to compensate all passengers for the ten-hour flight delay.
exampleZh: 航空公司同意对所有乘客的十小时航班延误进行补偿。

example: Buying a sports car was an extravagant purchase that he later deeply regretted making.
exampleZh: 买跑车是一次奢侈的消费，后来他对此深感后悔。

example: Staying at a five-star resort was a luxury they could only afford once a year.
exampleZh: 住在五星级度假村是一种他们一年只能负担一次的奢侈。

example: The community lives together in perfect harmony despite their different cultural backgrounds.
exampleZh: 尽管有着不同的文化背景，这个社区的人们和睦共处。

example: They decided to renovate the old farmhouse instead of tearing it down completely.
exampleZh: 他们决定翻新旧农舍而不是完全拆除它。

example: The children helped their parents decorate the Christmas tree with lights and colorful ornaments.
exampleZh: 孩子们帮父母用灯和彩色的饰品装饰圣诞树。

example: Oil is one of the most valuable and widely traded commodities in the global market.
exampleZh: 石油是全球市场上最有价值且交易最广泛的商品之一。

example: The bank detected that the passport was fake and immediately called the local police.
exampleZh: 银行发现护照是假的，立即报警通知了当地警方。

example: She is widely recognized as a pioneer in the field of modern genetic engineering research.
exampleZh: 她被广泛认为是现代基因工程研究领域的先驱。

example: The gardener had to spray the roses with pesticide to protect them from harmful insects.
exampleZh: 园丁不得不给玫瑰喷洒杀虫剂，以保护它们免受害虫侵害。

example: The bread had gone stale after sitting on the kitchen counter for more than a week.
exampleZh: 面包在厨房台面上放了一个多星期后已经不新鲜了。

example: Teenagers are often heavily influenced by the opinions and behavior of their peers at school.
exampleZh: 青少年常常受到学校同龄人的意见和行为的很大影响。

example: Besides English, she can also speak French and Japanese fluently in daily conversation.
exampleZh: 除了英语，她还能在日常对话中流利地说法语和日语。

example: The rising pollution levels pose a serious threat to the health of all city residents.
exampleZh: 不断上升的污染水平对全市居民的健康构成严重威胁。

example: A short afternoon nap can help refresh your mind and improve your work productivity.
exampleZh: 短暂的午睡可以帮助你恢复精力，提高工作效率。

example: The company rented a large storage facility to keep all their extra inventory and equipment.
exampleZh: 公司租了一个大型仓储设施来存放所有额外的库存和设备。

example: She hung a beautiful glass ornament on the highest branch of the Christmas tree.
exampleZh: 她把一个漂亮的玻璃饰品挂在圣诞树最高的树枝上。

example: You must renew your passport at least three months before the expiration date approaches.
exampleZh: 你必须在护照到期前至少三个月更新护照。

example: The plan is too expensive; furthermore, it is unlikely to succeed in such a short time.
exampleZh: 这个计划太昂贵了；此外，在这么短的时间内不太可能成功。

example: She wants to get rid of all the old clothes that she no longer wears anymore.
exampleZh: 她想处理掉所有不再穿的旧衣服。

example: The high employee turnover rate is a serious problem the company must address immediately.
exampleZh: 高员工流动率是公司必须立即解决的严重问题。

example: The case will be heard in court next Monday before a jury of twelve citizens.
exampleZh: 此案将于下周一在法庭由十二名公民组成的陪审团审理。

example: With determination and hard work, you can accomplish almost anything you set your mind to.
exampleZh: 有了决心和努力，你几乎可以完成任何你下定决心要做的事。

example: She finally achieved her lifelong dream of becoming a published author at the age of forty.
exampleZh: 她终于在四十岁时实现了成为出版作家的毕生梦想。

example: You must fulfill all the course requirements before you can receive your final certificate.
exampleZh: 你必须完成所有课程要求才能获得最终证书。

example: Speak softly in the library, lest you disturb the other people who are studying there.
exampleZh: 在图书馆里小声说话，以免打扰到其他在那里学习的人。

example: The villagers gathered in the temple to pray for rain during the long dry season.
exampleZh: 在漫长的旱季里，村民们聚集在庙里祈求降雨。

example: The store offers a wide array of products, from fresh food to electronic appliances.
exampleZh: 这家商店提供种类繁多的产品，从新鲜食品到电子电器。

example: He invested most of his savings in property, hoping the market value would continue to rise.
exampleZh: 他把大部分积蓄投资于房地产，希望市场价值能继续上涨。

example: The wealthy businessman purchased a vast estate with a lake and private forest attached.
exampleZh: 这位富商购买了一座附带湖泊和私人森林的广阔庄园。

example: The old painting was carefully restored by experts to its original beauty and condition.
exampleZh: 专家们小心地将这幅旧画恢复到其原有的美丽和状态。

example: The landlord agreed to fully furnish the apartment before the new tenants moved in.
exampleZh: 房东同意在新租客搬入前将公寓配置齐全家具。

example: Change is an inevitable part of life that we must all learn to accept and embrace.
exampleZh: 变化是生活中不可避免的一部分，我们都必须学会接受和拥抱。

example: The journey was long and difficult; nevertheless, they reached the summit before sunset.
exampleZh: 旅途漫长而艰难；然而，他们在日落前到达了山顶。

example: Jeans and a T-shirt are not appropriate attire for such a formal business meeting.
exampleZh: 牛仔裤和T恤对于这样正式的商务会议来说不是合适的着装。

example: You should leave now; otherwise, you will miss the last train back to the city center.
exampleZh: 你现在就该出发了；否则，你会错过回市中心的末班火车。

example: She is fully capable of handling the pressure that comes with this demanding job position.
exampleZh: 她完全有能力应对这个高要求职位带来的压力。

example: She is a valuable asset to the company because of her extensive knowledge and experience.
exampleZh: 她是公司的宝贵资产，因为她拥有丰富的知识和经验。

example: After years of traveling, they finally decided to settle down in a quiet coastal town.
exampleZh: 经过多年的旅行，他们最终决定在一个安静的沿海小镇定居。

example: Do not dwell on your past mistakes; instead, focus your energy on building a better future.
exampleZh: 不要纠缠于过去的错误；相反，把精力集中在建设更好的未来上。

example: She possesses a rare combination of intelligence, creativity, and exceptional leadership skills.
exampleZh: 她拥有智慧、创造力和卓越领导能力的罕见组合。

example: The internet has completely transformed the world of commerce over the past two decades.
exampleZh: 在过去的二十年里，互联网彻底改变了商业世界。

example: The region is prone to earthquakes, so all buildings must meet strict safety standards.
exampleZh: 该地区容易发生地震，因此所有建筑必须符合严格的安全标准。

example: Make sure the new software is compatible with your current computer operating system.
exampleZh: 确保新软件与你当前的计算机操作系统兼容。

example: She finished the entire project in spite of all the difficulties and obstacles she faced.
exampleZh: 尽管面临诸多困难和障碍，她还是完成了整个项目。

example: The government introduced new measures to tackle the growing problem of air pollution.
exampleZh: 政府出台了新措施来应对日益严重的空气污染问题。

example: She is learning how to cope with the stress that comes from her demanding new job.
exampleZh: 她正在学习如何应对来自高要求新工作的压力。

example: The detective carefully gathered all the clues to solve the mysterious disappearance case.
exampleZh: 侦探仔细收集了所有线索来解决这起神秘的失踪案。

example: The two nations agreed to resolve their long-standing border dispute through peaceful dialogue.
exampleZh: 两国同意通过和平对话解决长期的边界争端。

example: The sudden change of plans seemed to upset everyone who had already made travel arrangements.
exampleZh: 计划的突然改变似乎使所有已经做好旅行安排的人感到不安。

example: Can you switch off the lights when you leave the room to save some electricity?
exampleZh: 你离开房间的时候能关灯省电吗？

example: She took a deep breath and tried to remain calm despite the chaotic situation around her.
exampleZh: 尽管周围一片混乱，她深吸一口气，努力保持冷静。

example: Every citizen has a moral obligation to help those who are less fortunate in society.
exampleZh: 每个公民都有道德义务去帮助社会上那些不幸的人。

example: The sugar will dissolve more quickly in hot water than in cold water, as you may expect.
exampleZh: 正如你可能预料的那样，糖在热水中比在冷水中溶解得更快。

example: The scope of the research project has been expanded to include several additional case studies.
exampleZh: 该研究项目的范围已经扩大到包括几个额外的案例研究。

example: Pride and Prejudice is considered a classic novel that has been loved for many generations.
exampleZh: 《傲慢与偏见》被认为是一部世代喜爱的经典小说。

example: Please check each item on the list carefully before you sign the delivery receipt.
exampleZh: 在签收之前，请仔细检查清单上的每一项。

example: All human beings are mortal, so we should make the most of every single day we have.
exampleZh: 凡人终有一死，所以我们应当充分利用我们所拥有的每一天。

example: The company's strict work ethic has earned it a strong reputation in the global market.
exampleZh: 该公司严格的职业道德为其在全球市场赢得了良好的声誉。

example: Her research lies entirely within the realm of theoretical physics and advanced mathematics.
exampleZh: 她的研究完全属于理论物理学和高等数学的领域。

example: Over a span of just ten years, the small village transformed into a bustling modern city.
exampleZh: 在短短十年的时间里，这个小村庄变成了一座繁华的现代城市。

example: To her great dismay, she discovered that all her files had been accidentally deleted.
exampleZh: 令她大为沮丧的是，她发现所有的文件都被意外删除了。

example: Hot and humid weather is typical during the summer months in this coastal region.
exampleZh: 在这个沿海地区，夏季几个月里炎热潮湿的天气是典型的。

example: The artist drew a quick sketch of the beautiful landscape before starting the actual painting.
exampleZh: 艺术家在开始正式绘画之前，先绘制了这幅美丽风景的快速草图。

example: The company is working hard to improve its public image after the recent product scandal.
exampleZh: 在最近的产品丑闻之后，公司正在努力改善其公众形象。

example: I highly recommend this restaurant to anyone who enjoys authentic Italian cuisine and atmosphere.
exampleZh: 我强烈推荐这家餐厅给任何喜欢正宗意大利美食和氛围的人。

example: You must keep the receipt as proof of purchase if you want to return the item later.
exampleZh: 如果你想以后退货，就必须保留收据作为购买凭证。

example: My grandmother shared her secret recipe for the delicious homemade chicken soup with me.
exampleZh: 我的祖母与我分享了她那道美味家常鸡汤的秘方。

example: The two countries signed a reciprocal trade agreement to benefit both of their national economies.
exampleZh: 两国签署了一项互惠贸易协定，以造福两国的经济。

example: She moved out of her parents' house at eighteen, determined to be financially independent.
exampleZh: 她十八岁搬出父母家，决心在经济上独立。

example: The arts and culture scene began to flourish in the city after the new museum opened.
exampleZh: 新博物馆开放后，这座城市的艺术和文化景象开始繁荣起来。

example: You need two cups of flour, one egg, and some milk to make the pancake batter.
exampleZh: 你需要两杯面粉、一个鸡蛋和一些牛奶来做煎饼面糊。

example: The unemployment rate in the region dropped to its lowest level in over twenty years.
exampleZh: 该地区的失业率降至二十多年来的最低水平。

example: A large percentage of the students passed the final exam with very high scores this year.
exampleZh: 今年有很大比例的期末考试成绩非常高。

example: Nearly eighty percent of the respondents agreed that the new policy was beneficial overall.
exampleZh: 近百分之八十的受访者认为新政策总体是有益的。

example: The company plans to launch its newest smartphone model at the international tech conference next month.
exampleZh: 公司计划在下个月的国际科技大会上推出其最新的智能手机型号。

example: The small bakery made a modest profit in its first year of business despite fierce competition.
exampleZh: 尽管竞争激烈，这家小面包店在开业第一年就取得了微薄的利润。

example: Regular exercise brings both physical and mental benefits that can greatly improve your life.
exampleZh: 经常锻炼能带来身体和心理上的双重好处，可以极大地改善你的生活。

example: Mutual understanding is the key to building a strong and lasting friendship between two people.
exampleZh: 相互理解是建立两个人之间牢固持久友谊的关键。

example: The fierce competition among the top candidates made the interview process extremely challenging.
exampleZh: 顶尖候选人之间的激烈竞争使面试过程极具挑战性。

example: The witness provided a credible account of what had happened on the night of the incident.
exampleZh: 目击者对事发当晚发生的情况提供了可信的叙述。

example: The museum plans to display the ancient artifacts in a special exhibition starting next month.
exampleZh: 博物馆计划从下个月起在一个特别展览中展示这些古代文物。

example: The school rules strictly forbid students from using their mobile phones during class hours.
exampleZh: 学校规定严格禁止学生在课堂上使用手机。

example: The workers decided to strike for better wages and improved working conditions at the factory.
exampleZh: 工人们决定罢工，要求工厂提高工资和改善工作条件。

example: There is a striking resemblance between the two sisters, even though they are years apart.
exampleZh: 这两姐妹之间有着惊人的相似之处，尽管她们年龄相差好几岁。

example: The police could not make an arrest because they lacked sufficient proof against the suspect.
exampleZh: 警方无法实施逮捕，因为他们缺乏针对嫌疑人的充分证据。

example: The matter is of the utmost importance and must be dealt with immediately without any delay.
exampleZh: 这件事极其重要，必须毫不拖延地立即处理。

example: Her outstanding performance in the final exam earned her a full scholarship to the university.
exampleZh: 她在期末考试中的出色表现使她获得了该大学的奖学金。

example: The new CEO proposed a radical restructuring plan to save the struggling company from bankruptcy.
exampleZh: 新任CEO提出了一个激进的重组计划，以挽救这家陷入困境的公司免于破产。

example: The organization works tirelessly to promote racial equality and eliminate discrimination in society.
exampleZh: 该组织不懈努力地促进种族平等并消除社会上的歧视。

example: The city is famous for its diverse ethnic communities and rich multicultural heritage.
exampleZh: 这座城市以其多样化的民族社区和丰富的多元文化遗产而闻名。

example: The professor used several real-world examples to illustrate the key points of his complex theory.
exampleZh: 教授用了几个现实世界的例子来说明他复杂理论的关键点。

example: She dropped a subtle hint about what she wanted for her birthday without directly saying it.
exampleZh: 她没有直接说，而是微妙地暗示了她想要的生日礼物。

example: The symptoms of the disease may take several weeks to manifest after the initial infection occurs.
exampleZh: 该疾病的症状可能在初次感染发生几周后才会显现出来。

example: The primary goal of this project is to reduce carbon emissions by at least thirty percent.
exampleZh: 这个项目的主要目标是将碳排放减少至少百分之三十。

example: It was an incredible experience to watch the sunrise from the top of the mountain.
exampleZh: 从山顶看日出是一次难以置信的经历。

example: The teacher gave explicit instructions on how to complete the science experiment safely.
exampleZh: 老师对如何安全地完成科学实验给出了明确的指示。

example: Her dedication to public service exemplifies the true spirit of selfless community leadership.
exampleZh: 她对公共服务的奉献体现了无私社区领导力的真正精神。

example: The audience consisted mostly of young students who were eager to learn about the topic.
exampleZh: 观众主要由渴望了解该主题的年轻学生组成。

example: The primitive tools found at the archaeological site date back over ten thousand years.
exampleZh: 考古遗址发现的原始工具可追溯到一万多年前。

zh: 似乎合理的；貌似可信的
example: The scientist offered a plausible explanation for the strange phenomenon observed in the experiment.
exampleZh: 科学家为实验中观察到的奇怪现象提供了一个貌似合理的解释。

example: The gallery will exhibit the famous artist's latest paintings throughout the entire month of May.
exampleZh: 画廊将在整个五月份展出这位著名艺术家的最新画作。

example: The law prohibits smoking in all enclosed public spaces, including restaurants and shopping malls.
exampleZh: 法律禁止在所有封闭的公共场所吸烟，包括餐馆和购物中心。

example: The government decided to ban single-use plastic bags to reduce environmental pollution nationwide.
exampleZh: 政府决定禁止使用一次性塑料袋，以减少全国范围内的环境污染。

zh: 可怕的；令人敬畏的；强大的
example: Climbing Mount Everest is a formidable challenge that requires months of preparation and training.
exampleZh: 攀登珠穆朗玛峰是一项需要数月准备和训练的艰巨挑战。

example: It became evident that the company was in serious financial trouble after reviewing the quarterly report.
exampleZh: 在审查季度报告后，公司陷入严重财务困境的情况变得明显。
